overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a narrow medieval village street at night in a video game. A villager carrying a torch approaches from the distance, passes by closely on the left, and continues behind the camera as the viewer proceeds past wooden carts parked along the right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval alleyway between stone buildings

events.description: villager carrying a lit torch becomes visible walking toward the camera
torch-bearer passes within close proximity on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the narrow street toward an approaching figure holding a torch

notable_agents.action: villager carrying a lit torch walking toward the camera, illuminating the street

entered.detail: tall medieval stone building with small windows and arched doorway
high stone and plaster wall running along the right side of the alley
wooden two-wheeled cart parked against the right wall

segments.scene_description: Walking down a narrow medieval alley at night, approaching a villager who carries a torch. The warm torchlight illuminates the stone buildings on the left and the plaster wall on the right, where a wooden cart sits parked. The villager walks toward the camera, passing closely by on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval alleyway with parked wooden carts

events.description: camera passes the wooden cart on the right, moving from mid-ground to foreground

agents.ego_description: continuing down the dark alley after the torch-bearer has passed, moving past the wooden carts

segments.scene_description: After the torch-bearer passes, the scene grows darker as the camera continues down the narrow alley. The wooden cart on the right moves from the mid-ground to the immediate foreground as the camera walks past it. The stone buildings continue on both sides, and the path ahead remains dimly lit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a narrow medieval alley that shifts from a warm, torch-lit encounter to a dim, solitary walk. It begins with the camera advancing toward a villager carrying a torch, whose flickering light illuminates the surrounding stone buildings and a wooden cart parked against a plaster wall. As the villager passes closely by on the left, the warm glow recedes, causing the environment to grow darker. The camera then continues forward, bringing the wooden cart from the mid-ground into the immediate foreground as it is passed. Finally, the scene settles into a dimly lit path, flanked by stone walls that stretch into the shadows ahead.
